description: Phase 3 PR 1 — orphan public-IP waste lane vertical slice. Two subscriptions (77.../77 = corp-shared-platform-test, 88.../88 = corp-app-team-sandbox) carry 5 orphan public IPs total across 2 subs, 1 attached IP (must NOT appear in the lane output — the ARG predicate filters it), and 1 orphan IP with an unknown SKU (Basic/Dynamic) so the lane renders 'rate unavailable for SKU PublicIPAddress_Basic_Dynamic'. Cost-summary playbook output is minimal (one quiet day, no notable activity).
